name: Quarterly Vendor Performance Review Workflow
serviceNowSurface: AI Agent Studio agent with read-only tools; NASK summarization skill; human approval gate
trigger: Scheduled quarterly or on-demand from a vendor manager
businessOutcome: Produce a structured quarterly vendor performance draft per strategic vendor in one business day, ready for human refinement, without any direct write or auto-action.
steps: Load the vendor list and quarter window.
For each vendor, read incidents linked to vendor CIs in the window.
Read change_request records linked to vendor changes in the window.
Read SLA breaches and contract metadata in scope.
Run the NASK summarization skill with structured output for the five review fields.
Aggregate into a comparison table across the quarter.
Produce recommended actions with required human approval flag.
Log all read events and the draft creation event.
approvalPoints: Procurement lead sign-off before draft becomes the official starting point
Legal review on any recommended action that touches contract terms
Human approval mandatory before any contract or penalty change
failureStates: Tool returns more than the row cap: paginate; if still excessive, mark vendor as partial_scan and surface for manual review.
Contract not in scope tag: skip and log the skip event; do not attempt cross-scope read.
NASK skill returns malformed output: retry once; on second failure, mark vendor as failed_summary and surface for manual review.
auditNotes: All read events logged with prompt, response, user, timestamp.
Structured drafts retained per quarter for procurement audit.
Owner of record: a named vendor manager (CPF and email).
tests: Write attempt by the agent fails by tool whitelist.
Comparison table renders all 40 vendors with five structured fields each.
Penalty recommendation never auto-executes; always awaits human approval.
Audit retrieval rehearsal completes within one business day.
